creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Maintainer update of port mail/mutt-devel:

	- Fix automake to generate BSDmake compatible code
	- Drop usage of GNUmake
	- Add primary mutt-site to the MASTER_SITES
	- Update to most recent mutt version 1.3.24

Committer: Removed file: files/extra-patchlist.sh
